graphs.api_endpoint_graph: Django urls.py and DRF routers indexed as route symbols.
graphs.background_task_graph: Celery task files indexed under backend/apps/*/tasks.py, backend/apps/reports/tasks.py, and mds-client task modules.
graphs.class_dependency_graph: Seeded from imports and symbols; detailed inheritance/composition is populated per audited module.
graphs.configuration_graph: Settings indexed under backend/config/settings, frontend config, package files, and deploy config.
graphs.database_schema_graph: Django models and migrations indexed; foreign-key detail is populated during backend module audits.
graphs.function_call_graph: Seeded at symbol/import level; deep call graph is populated per audited module.
graphs.react_component_tree: Entry path: frontend/src/main.tsx -> App -> providers -> routes; route/component details come from .claude index and AppRoutes.
graphs.script_graph: Scripts indexed under scripts/**, backend/scripts/**, and root shell scripts.
graphs.state_management_graph: No Redux/Zustand found in prior architecture notes; AuthContext and ThemeContext are shared state roots.
graphs.test_graph: Tests indexed under backend/tests, app-level tests, mds-client/tests, master-data-service tests, and frontend Vitest files.

impact_analysis.rule: When a file changes, reload only the file, its imports, dependents, and mapped tests before updating this artifact.

dependency_notes.finding: No live Django render/template-loader/runtime path; only stale self-contained legacy template references remained before deletion.

Retained as Django conventional 500 template from backend/templates; hardened to self-contained noindex markup with focused render regression.
